title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Sugar Development Fund Act, 1982. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 11st June, 1982, vide notification No. G.S.R. 436(E), dated 29th May, 1982, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
